name: Agencies
blurb: Agencies juggling many client accounts need automation that scales across workspaces without per-seat costs spiralling.

name: Startups
blurb: Early-stage teams need affordable, flexible tools that grow with them and don't require a dedicated ops hire.

name: Enterprise
blurb: Large organisations prioritise governance, security, compliance and the ability to orchestrate complex cross-department workflows.

name: SaaS Companies
blurb: Product teams embedding automation and AI into their own software need developer-grade, API-first tooling.

name: E-commerce
blurb: Online stores automate marketing, support and order flows to convert and retain at scale with lean teams.

name: Sales Teams
blurb: Revenue teams want enriched pipelines, automated outreach and CRM hygiene that frees reps to sell.

name: Marketing Teams
blurb: Marketers automate campaigns, content and lead routing to do more with fewer manual hours.

name: Solopreneurs
blurb: One-person businesses need affordable, easy automation to punch above their weight without a tech team.
